item.title: Everyone hates us, it’s damn well time we join them because they have damn good reasons

item.title: This loser worked for Jack Schlossberg campaign btw , and Beccera
item.description:
This loser worked for Jack Schlossberg campaign btw , and Beccera. She literally exists to maintain establishment, Zionistpolitics in the norm in the name of electability but at the FIRST opportunity she punches right. Electability is a term made up by the corporate forces that literally fund and control our election#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are kinda dropping the first part atp tbh

item.title: As I’ve said, you can tactically engage with anything to get a temporary political solution - but if you’re political project is...
item.description:
As I’ve said, you can tactically engage with anything to get a temporary political solution - but if you’re political project is not oriented towards abolishing Americanism for the liberation of the occupied nations of the United States, but it is oriented towards rehabilitating America to represent the national interest of the majority white “ bourgeoisie” you will always pander to the lab aristocracy and not it’s victims.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is a part of an active rewriting of American history rewrites ayn rand esque ideology into the founding of the United State...
